name: lore
description: Share Codex sessions to Lore and read threads back.

interface.shortDescription: Share Codex sessions and read Lore threads
interface.longDescription: Lore is a thin Codex plugin that bootstraps the @tanagram/lore CLI on first use so you can share the current Codex session to Lore and read Lore threads back without leaving Codex.
defaultPrompt: Share this Codex session to Lore.
Find recent Lore threads that touched apps/api.
